TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Chauncey Billups == kawas te 1976, byacing te 9 ru 25 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Colorado, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 191 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 95 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1997 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Boston Celtics. qyanux na sraral Billups htagan beh sa Denver, Colorado. 1995 kawas tmasot pqwasan biru beh George Washington High School. 1995 kawas hopa pqwasan biru hiya ga magal blaq balay mari p'unro. Piper neril nya maki cyugal kneril laqi Cydney,Ciara ru Cenaiya lalu nya. hiya ga sswe mlikuy Rodney lalu nya. 2002-2005 kawas maki beh University of Denver rasaw mari gluw.raran ga Rodney sakang' NBA.musa Europe mspung.tmasot lga tmwang mincyogun na qyanux. Billups maki gocyu ru hopa pqwasan biru ru mincyogun na qyanux te payat na mspung. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨħaunʦ~ʨej βillups~ɕ == kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa ʦ~ʨolora*o, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu βos~ɕton ʦ~ʨeltiʦ~ʨs~ɕ. qjanux na s~ɕraral βillups~ɕ ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa *en*er, ʦ~ʨolora*o. **** kawas~ɕ tmas~ɕot pqwas~ɕan βiru βeħ ɣeorɣe was~ɕħiŋton ħiɣħ s~ɕʦ~ʨħool. **** kawas~ɕ ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru ħija ɣa maɣal βlaq βalaj mari pʔunro. piper neril nja maki ʦ~ʨjuɣal kneril laqi ʦ~ʨj*nej,ʦ~ʨiara ru ʦ~ʨenaija lalu nja. ħija ɣa s~ɕs~ɕwe mlikuj ro*nej lalu nja. ****-**** kawas~ɕ maki βeħ uni*ers~ɕitj o* *en*er ras~ɕaw mari ɣluw.raran ɣa ro*nej s~ɕakaŋʔ nβa.mus~ɕa europe ms~ɕpuŋ.tmas~ɕot lɣa tmwaŋ minʦ~ʨjoɣun na qjanux. βillups~ɕ maki ɣoʦ~ʨju ru ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru ru minʦ~ʨjoɣun na qjanux te pajat na ms~ɕpuŋ. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: == Chauncey Billups == kawas te 1976, byacing te 9 ru 25 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Colorado, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 191 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 95 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1997 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Boston Celtics. qyanux na sraral Billups htagan beh sa Denver, Colorado. 1995 kawas tmasot pqwasan biru beh George Washington High School. 1995 kawas hopa pqwasan biru hiya ga magal blaq balay mari p'unro. Piper neril nya maki cyugal kneril laqi Cydney,Ciara ru Cenaiya lalu nya. hiya ga sswe mlikuy Rodney lalu nya. 2002-2005 kawas maki beh University of Denver rasaw mari gluw.raran ga Rodney sakang' NBA.musa Europe mspung.tmasot lga tmwang mincyogun na qyanux. Billups maki gocyu ru hopa pqwasan biru ru mincyogun na qyanux te payat na mspung. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨħaunʦ~ʨej βillups~ɕ == kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa ʦ~ʨolora*o, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu βos~ɕton ʦ~ʨeltiʦ~ʨs~ɕ. qjanux na s~ɕraral βillups~ɕ ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa *en*er, ʦ~ʨolora*o. **** kawas~ɕ tmas~ɕot pqwas~ɕan βiru βeħ ɣeorɣe was~ɕħiŋton ħiɣħ s~ɕʦ~ʨħool. **** kawas~ɕ ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru ħija ɣa maɣal βlaq βalaj mari pʔunro. piper neril nja maki ʦ~ʨjuɣal kneril laqi ʦ~ʨj*nej,ʦ~ʨiara ru ʦ~ʨenaija lalu nja. ħija ɣa s~ɕs~ɕwe mlikuj ro*nej lalu nja. ****-**** kawas~ɕ maki βeħ uni*ers~ɕitj o* *en*er ras~ɕaw mari ɣluw.raran ɣa ro*nej s~ɕakaŋʔ nβa.mus~ɕa europe ms~ɕpuŋ.tmas~ɕot lɣa tmwaŋ minʦ~ʨjoɣun na qjanux. βillups~ɕ maki ɣoʦ~ʨju ru ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru ru minʦ~ʨjoɣun na qjanux te pajat na ms~ɕpuŋ. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
